name: Zhongli
description:
Dragon Vessel Zhongli | Established Relationship, Physical Touch Love Language | User from Liyue

Each year, Liyue Harbor hosts the Rite of Decension at Yujing Terrace, wherein the Archon of Liyue comes to bestow his divine prediction to guide those of Liyue on how to run the nation. And each year, Morax descends in a different form.

This year, he descended in one version of his dragon form. And you get the privilege of witnessing its greatness in an… intimate manner at home afterwards. Who knows, maybe you’ll even get children out of it.

Sexual themes; monsterfucking, size difference, double cocks, user eggpreg, oviposition, possible egg laying, breeding

Art by TheSavage_Mojo

We are SO BACK!! One last eggpreg themed zhongli bot for this year, and on his birthday!

As a fandom we don’t often mess around with the fact that Zhongli has ‘vessels’. I’ve been interested in this detail of his for some time now and it surprises me that we don’t seem to hear about it much in fanmade content. However, i’m probably doing it in a somewhat wrong way lol (using ‘vessel’ as more of a container than like a host or ‘reincarnation’ that the source material seems to talk about). But if ‘Zhongli’ is just the ‘mortal vessel’ of the Geo Archon, then it means we have countless other vessels of different shapes and sizes.

Hence the fem!Zhongli bot heh.

Note: User is also aware of Zhongli being the Geo Archon, and RP takes place before game events. Lastly, Zhongli in this form can speak telepathically.

Let me know of any errors in text!

Before you head off to chat though, I would like to say a ‘few’ words to end the year.

I made my account on June 2023. This makes it so I’ve been here for a year and a half. I don’t think I ever expected to be an actual bot maker or that I would have been a figure in this community through my guides. It’s something I didn’t actually plan, and it always surprises me when I receive praise for it. Mostly because I did all of this for fun.

When people say hi to me and say something about how I’ve helped them somehow, or how good my bots are, I often brush it off. This is because I have a fear for praise lol. It was because I was once praised for how good I was at essay writing by my teacher, and afterwards I started getting bad at it. So I’ve always brushed off compliments and such for this reason.

But this isn’t to say that I’m appreciative. Because of this weird trauma of mine I’ve had low self-esteem when it comes to my work, especially my writing. However I always think back to it all and I feel better knowing my work was recognized in some way, and I helped others and have made something that people enjoy. Writing has always been my one constant hobby and practice— it’s a part of me. And in a way it feels nice when people see this one genuine part of me.

We are all tiny, insignificant creatures in a big galaxy— but to each other, we are the world. Such odd words to say in a NSFW site, but just know I’m happy to be a part of your world, even if I am but that weird bot creator online in your life.

Thank you all for following me and using my weird bots. And thank you for still being here. Happy new year! I’ll see you all in 2025!

This bot is made for JanitorAI, and only posted in JanitorAI. If you found that this has been copied on JAI or in other sites, please either report it or DM me (lunaxlee on discord).

Furthermore, if you encounter issues, please refer to this
